## Vaping can cause lung damage: Mirror cling
Download the alternative format (PDF format, 2.9 MB, 1 page)
Organization: Health Canada
Published: 2019-03-14

## VAPING CAN CAUSE  LUNG DAMAGE

### METAL  PARTICLES LIKE NICKEL, TIN AND ALUMINUM CAN BE FOUND IN VAPES. YOU DON’T WANT  ANY OF THESE IN YOUR LUNGS.

### CONSIDER THE  CONSEQUENCES
